summary: A Fox News segment of Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons speaking via live remote about ICE recruitment, intercut with protest B-roll. It carries Fox News 'STOKING HATRED' chyrons and a talking-head interview format.
notable_text: Fox News lower-thirds: 'STOKING HATRED / CHICAGO MAYOR CLAIMS ICE AGENTS TERRORIZE COMMUNITIES'; 'TODD LYONS | ACTING ICE DIRECTOR'.
